title: wollastonia scabriuscula
intro: Wollastonia scabriuscula, also known as Wollastonia, is a type of flowering plant in the daisy family that is native to tropical regions of Asia and Australia. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant is valued for its ability to promote wound healing, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. Wollastonia scabriuscula is often prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its health benefits and medicinal properties.
